Repository: `vfi64/agentic-project-kit`

No Agentic Project Kit file, document registry entry, rule registry entry, planning object, Direction item, implementation file or pull request was created or modified for the federated system-foundation initiative.

Review limitation: this statement documents the deliberate non-change boundary. The reviewer may inspect the readable Kit repository for contradictions, but there is no Kit-side change set to hash or review as part of this package.
